prompt: Edit image 1: Transform the 'TOTAL DUE' section to visually represent a successful payment confirmation, using the style and incorporating the green checkmark icon from the 'Payment Successful' section of image 2.
prompt_refined: Edit image 1: In the bottom right corner, transform the 'TOTAL DUE' section to visually confirm a successful payment of '500.00'. Integrate the overall visual style, including background color and text aesthetics, and the specific green checkmark icon from the 'Payment Successful' section of image 2 into this transformed area. Position the green checkmark prominently, similar to its placement next to the amount in image 2.
objects: Bottom right section transformed to visually confirm successful payment
Text "Payment Successful" in the transformed bottom right section
Amount "500.00" in the transformed bottom right section
Green checkmark icon in the transformed bottom right section
Green checkmark icon prominently positioned next to "500.00"
Light grey background for the transformed bottom right section
Text aesthetics for "Payment Successful" and "500.00" matching image 2's success section
"TOTAL" label with value "500.00" above the transformed section
"PAID" label with its value (hyphen) above the transformed section
